title: Venezuela earthquake rescue teams listen for signs of life as death toll mounts
body: At least 1,450 people have died since devastating earthquakes in Venezuela. In La Guaira and Caracas, rescue teams are digging through the rubble. Follow for live updates

title: Venezuela earthquake death toll climbs over 1,400 as rescuers search
body: Foreign rescue teams - including three from the United States - were racing time in the aftermath of twin earthquakes that rocked Venezuela's northern coast this week as the death toll from the disaster eclipsed 1,400, officials said.

title: Venezuela rocked by back-to-back 7.5 and 7.2 earthquakes
body: Two powerful earthquakes struck the northern coast of Venezuela successively on Wednesday, leading to collapsed buildings in the capital Caracas.

title: Families flee homes as earthquake strikes southwestern China
body: Families rushed from their homes after a magnitude 5.5 earthquake struck Sichuan Province in southwestern China just after midnight on June 29, 2026. CCTV footage shows residents waking to earthquake alerts and evacuating buildings as the shaking was felt across the area.

title: Chaotic Rush to Help Venezuela Earthquake Victims Delays Some Rescues
body: International teams were joining search efforts on Saturday after twin earthquakes killed more than 900 people in northern Venezuela and left many trapped.

title: Venezuelans take search for the missing into their own hands as earthquake death toll climbs
body: The death toll from two powerful earthquakes in Venezuela has risen to 589, with 2,980 injured. Acting President Delcy Rodríguez announced the update early Friday, surrounded by government and military officials,

title: Incredible moment Venezuelan rescuers pull crying newborn from rubble after devastating earthquake
body: An infant was miraculously rescued from the rubble after Venezuela's devastating earthquake, which left thousands dead or missing.

title: Rosalía Voices Support for Venezuela Earthquake Victims at Concert Performance
body: Rosalia is not only winning over her fans with her incredible music, but also with her plea for Venezuela earthquake victims.

title: What to know about earthquake early warning systems
body: Venezuela was struck with a pair of deadly earthquakes Wednesday evening and Thursday morning that brought significant shaking to the northern coast of Japan . Earlier in the week residents in the U.S. state of California experienced a moderate earthquake , and at the start of June, 37 people in the Philippines died in a quake near Mindanao .

title: Preliminary 5.6 magnitude earthquake strikes in Mendocino County
body: A preliminary 5.6 magnitude earthquake struck in Redwood Valley according to the United States Geological Survey. The epicenter was recorded just after 8:10 a.m. at 6.8 miles west north-west of Potter Valley and 14.
